dashboard.subtitle: Manage your AI workspaces and start building next-generation intelligent applications.

emptyState.title: Start Your First Workspace
emptyState.description: Create a workspace and import a GitHub repository to start building with natural language.
emptyState.descriptionSuffix: All your projects will be displayed here.

createDialog.title: Create Workspace
createDialog.description: Create a new workspace for your project
createDialog.nameInvalidChars: Workspace name contains invalid characters. Only letters, numbers, Chinese characters, spaces, hyphens, underscores, and dots are allowed

deleteDialog.title: Delete "{name}"?
deleteDialog.description: This will delete the workspace. Once deleted, it will be removed from your list.

error.loadFailedDescription: Unable to load workspace list. Please check your network connection and try again.
error.deleteFailed: Delete failed. Please try again later.
error.operationFailed: Operation failed. Please try again later.
error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
